title: Remove hero section background image

requirements.text: Remove the background image div element from the HeroSection component (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[1]/div[1])
acceptanceCriteria: The div element at the specified XPath is removed from HeroSection.tsx
The hero section no longer displays the background image
The component remains functional without errors

nonGoals: Adding new images or content to the hero section
Modifying other sections of the application
Changing the overall layout or styling beyond removing the specified element
